This is where our society has gone wrong, parents protecting children at all coats at all ages. Your job is not to protect your child from the world it is to teach them to protect themselves from the world. We now have a generation where so many of them lack resilience and self sufficiency, mum and dad have always done everything for them, paid for everything and come to the rescue when they've messed up, insisting it isn't their fault, and that the world really is against them. Yes financially its tougher than when I was starting out, but no where near as bad as people make out, just many of these adult babies haven't been equipped to make the hard choices. My 20 year old son, is still at home and will be for a few years, but he works full time, realised uni was a bad investment and is doing OK without it, he pays board to live here (though we just save it so he has a deposit for his own place) he has a pension, and is already impressed how much it's grown versus what he has paid in.

I had a situation where I was supposed to die, but I didn't. Taken two long years to recover as much as I have, not completely but almost back to normal. Thank you for not giving up on her. Kelly Brook has shared one clever way to keep cool while working out in the gym while on a sun-soaked holiday - by lifting weights in her bikini. Isla Fisher shares racy holiday photo as she enjoys a family getaway to Greece

Isla Fisher appeared to be enjoying the simple things in life on Tuesday as she shared a sneak peek into her recent family trip to Greece. The Australian actress, 50, shared a series of photos to Instagram of her getaway, including one racy image that saw her strip down to a pair of bikini bottoms. Taking in the skyline view of a coastal town, Isla could be seen flashing her derrière in a pair of blue briefs as she bent over the railing of a balcony.
